name: Caribbean Suprise
recipeIngredient: 1.5 cups canned or fresh pineapple chunks (more or less)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the black beans and tomatoes.
2. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
3. If needed, add some of the drained tomato or pineapple juice to thin the mixture.
4. Heat everything together until heated through.
5. Serve over rice or pasta. Feel free to add chopped peppers, water chestnuts, or any other vegetables you like.
Note: The original recipe does not include a specific date or attribution.
